title: Supply Chain Manager - Aramex India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Aramex India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
